About Los Altos Construction

12+ years serving Long Beach and surrounding areas

Los Altos Construction started with a simple goal: to provide Long Beach homeowners with top-quality siding solutions and unmatched craftsmanship. We saw the need for a reliable contractor who understood the unique challenges of our coastal climate and the diverse architectural styles of our neighborhoods, from Belmont Shore to Bixby Knolls.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, offer honest advice, and deliver exceptional work. We believe in clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and using only the best materials to ensure your siding stands the test of time. We tackle every project with the same dedication, from small repairs to complete home transformations.

As a Long Beach-based company, we're committed to giving back to the community that has supported us. We actively participate in local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible waste management and sustainable material sourcing. Los Altos Construction is more than just a business; we're your neighbors.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Los Altos Construction

Trusted siding installer professionals serving Long Beach, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
